title: Local Coach and Teacher Passes Away Unexpectedly
summary: A beloved local coach and teacher has died. The cause of death is currently unknown, leaving the community in mourning.
charlotte_impact: Sudden loss impacts the school and local community, highlighting the importance of community figures.

title: Arrest Made in Deadly Pool Party Shooting
summary: A suspect has been arrested in connection with a deadly shooting at a pool party on Hucks Road. The incident involved hundreds of teenagers.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community safety concerns and the aftermath of violent crime involving young people.

title: Charlotte Weather Forecast: Heat Building This Weekend
summary: The weather forecast predicts increasing heat and humidity for Charlotte this weekend, with hotter conditions expected next week.

title: I-77 Toll Lane Project Faces Uncertainty Amid Opposition
summary: Charlotte's I-77 toll lane project is in limbo as city officials reconsider their support due to traffic concerns at Exit 5.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing debates about infrastructure development and its impact on traffic and local communities.

title: Pride Magazine Announces 34th Annual Pride Awards
summary: Pride Magazine's 34th Annual Pride Awards will be held on July 10 at the Ritz-Carlton in Charlotte, featuring a renowned AI professor.

title: Water Main Break Closes Busy Road in South Charlotte
summary: A broken water main has caused the closure of inbound lanes on Providence Road in south Charlotte, leading to traffic disruptions.

title: Former Mayoral Candidate Offers to Serve as Interim Mayor
summary: Brendan Maginnis, a former Democratic candidate, has offered to serve as interim mayor following Vi Lyles' resignation.

title: Mandatory Water Restrictions Implemented in Charlotte Due to Severe Drought
summary: Charlotte Water has begun mandatory water restrictions on May 15, limiting usage and urging conservation due to a severe drought.

title: CMPD Raids East Charlotte Arcade, Seizes Cash and Guns
summary: Police raided an east Charlotte gambling arcade, seizing nearly $38,000 in cash, numerous devices, and two guns.

title: Charlotte Woman Sentenced in Child Sexual Exploitation Case
summary: Aisha Khan was sentenced to 262 months in prison followed by a lifetime of supervised release for child sexual exploitation.

summary: A firefighter was killed in an explosion at a lumber mill in Searsmont. At least 10 others were hospitalized.

title: Charlotte Business Owner Battles Rare Kidney Disease

title: Lane Closures Postponed for I-277 Rail Trail Bridge Project
summary: The lane closures for the I-277 Rail Trail Bridge Project have been postponed. A new start date has not yet been determined.
